title: Revisiting Biomarker-Guided Therapy in EGFR-Mutant Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer with High PD-L1 Expression.
snippet: Epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR)-mutant non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) has historically been regarded as a therapeutically uniform entity, characterized by marked sensitivity to EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitors (TKIs) and limited responsiveness to immune-checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs). However, accumulating clinical and translational data suggest he...
